productType: 3D printed plant accessories and home decor — pots, trellises, vases, wall planters, table lamps
audience: Plant lovers, indoor gardeners, modern home decor shoppers
tone: Modern, friendly, design-forward. Highlight 3D printing, drainage, eco-friendly materials, and practical plant care.

namingRules.pot: Use a short creative name in curly quotes plus Pot, e.g. "Serik" Pot or "Uldol" Pot
namingRules.vase: Use a short creative name in curly quotes plus Vase, e.g. "Lunor" Vase
namingRules.trellis: Use a descriptive name ending with Plant Trellis, e.g. LEGO Inspired Plant Trellis or Natural Plant Trellis
namingRules.wall_planter: Use a descriptive name like Wall Planter - Arches
namingRules.table_lamp: Use a creative product name like Soru Table Lamp

descriptionBullets: Sleek modern design with effective drainage (when applicable)
Made to order — slight variations are normal for 3D printed items
careNotes: Recommended for indoor use. Avoid prolonged direct sunlight or excessive heat, which may cause fading or warping.
etsyTitleGuidance: Write a keyword-rich Etsy SEO title up to 140 characters. Start with the design or product name, then stack searchable phrases shoppers actually type: 3D printed, planter, indoor plant, succulent, drainage, modern home decor, etc. Include opening diameter, height, or dimensions when provided in attributes. Use natural readable phrasing — not comma-only keyword spam. For pots and vases, keep the quoted creative name near the front (e.g. "Nori" Plant Pot 3D Printed...).
